name: United States (1846–1847)
description: Thirteen alternating red and white horizontal stripes, with a navy canton in the upper hoist bearing 28 white five-pointed stars.
history: The 28-star flag of the United States, official from 4 July 1846 to 3 July 1847. The 28th star was added for Texas, admitted to the Union on 29 December 1845. Replaced by the 29-star flag in 1847 (when Iowa was admitted).

features.symbolism: the 28 states then in the union, ending with Texas
